why_work.title: Why Work With Us?
why_work.subtitle: What sets us apart from other creators
why_work.reach_desc: Deep audience in Sangli, Satara & Solapur belt — your customers are our followers
why_work.content_desc: Content that speaks your customer's language — literally. Genuine, relatable, Marathi-first
why_work.turnaround_desc: From brief to posted reel in just 48 hours. Fast, reliable, and professional
why_work.results_desc: Every campaign backed by real engagement data. We deliver views, not just videos

final_cta.title: Ready to Grow Your Business?
final_cta.subtitle: Let's create content that puts your brand in front of 2 lakh+ audience

about.story_p1: What started as a passion for showcasing the beauty and culture of Vita has grown into a powerful digital platform. With over 2 lakh followers on Instagram, Vita Golden City Official has become the go-to voice for everything happening in and around Vita.
about.story_p2: We believe every local business has a story worth telling. From the corner tea shop to the biggest jeweler in town — every brand deserves to be seen, heard, and remembered. That's what we do. We turn local businesses into local legends.
about.story_p3: Our content is rooted in authenticity. We don't just promote — we tell stories that resonate with the Marathi-speaking audience of Sangli, Satara, and Solapur. Every reel is crafted with care, every story is shot with purpose.
about.value_1_desc: We keep it real. No fake reviews, no scripted promotions. Just genuine stories about genuine businesses.
about.value_2_desc: We grow when our community grows. Every brand we promote adds value to Vita's local economy.
about.value_3_desc: We'd rather make one incredible reel than ten mediocre ones. Your brand deserves the best.
about.value_4_desc: Clear pricing, honest expectations, and real results. No hidden charges, no surprises.

faq.hero_subtitle: Everything you need to know before collaborating with us
faq.q1: How much do you charge for a reel?
faq.a1: Our pricing depends on the type of content, duration, and scope of the campaign. We offer packages starting from Story Shoutouts to full Brand Ambassador plans. Submit our collab form for an exact quote tailored to your needs.
faq.q2: Do you cover businesses outside Vita?
faq.a2: Yes! While our primary audience is from the Sangli, Satara, and Solapur belt, we've worked with businesses across Maharashtra. If your target audience overlaps with ours, we'd love to collaborate.
faq.q3: How fast do you respond after I submit the form?
faq.a3: We typically respond within 24 hours of receiving your collab request. For urgent requirements, you can also reach out via WhatsApp for a quicker response.
faq.q4: What's the turnaround time after we book?
faq.a4: For standard reel promotions, we deliver within 48 hours of the shoot. Event coverage and ambassador packages have custom timelines that we discuss during the planning phase.
faq.q5: Do I get to approve the content before posting?
faq.a5: Absolutely! We share a preview of the content before it goes live. You get to review and request changes to ensure it perfectly represents your brand.
faq.a6: We require 50% advance before the shoot and 50% before posting. We accept UPI, bank transfer, and cash payments. Full payment details are shared after booking confirmation.
faq.a7: If the content hasn't been shot yet, we offer a full refund minus a small booking fee. Once content is produced, refunds are handled on a case-by-case basis. We always aim for your complete satisfaction.
faq.q8: Do you provide content rights? Can I repost?
faq.a8: Yes! You receive full rights to repost the content on your own social media pages. We also provide the raw footage for standard and premium packages.
faq.q9: What kind of businesses do you NOT promote?
faq.a9: We don't promote illegal businesses, misleading products, gambling, or anything that could harm our audience. We also reserve the right to decline projects that don't align with our values.
faq.a10: Of course! We're based in Vita, Sangli district. We're happy to meet in person to discuss your campaign. You can also visit during the shoot to see the magic happen live.
